list.vod_content: Cookster: The Darkest Days ç®€ن»‹A dyslexic teen misunderstood by his family and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer struggling with addiction and debt while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;A former communist activist and a laid-back man who embraces a &quot;live and let live&quot; p
list.vod_content: A former communist activist and a laid-back man who embraces a "live and let live" philosophy strike up an unlikely friendship while meeting regularly on a park bench, discovering common ground despite their contrasting worldviews.

list.vod_content: Aqilla and Yumna, two mothers who both fought for Baskara's love and happiness. Aqilla gave up her biological son, Baskara, to be raised by Arif and Yumna in Solo.
